about_page.headline: About Joelle's Lounge
about_page.tagline: Fine dining rooted in community, craft, and a genuine love of great food.
about_page.overview:
Joelle's Lounge was born from a simple belief: that a great meal is about more than just the food on your plate. Founded by Joelle Martin, the restaurant grew out of years of traveling, cooking, and a deep appreciation for the way a shared table can bring people together.

From day one, we've been committed to sourcing the finest local and seasonal ingredients, partnering with nearby farms and artisan producers who share our values. Every dish on our menu tells a story — of the land it came from, the hands that prepared it, and the guests who inspired it.

Whether you're celebrating a milestone, enjoying a quiet dinner for two, or gathering with friends, Joelle's Lounge is your place. We're here to make every visit feel like coming home.

team.name: Joelle Martin
team.blurb: Joelle's vision for a warm, community-driven restaurant has guided every decision since opening day. With a background in culinary arts and hospitality management, she brings passion and precision to everything she does — from curating the menu to welcoming every guest personally.

team.name: Marcus Rivera
team.blurb: Chef Marcus brings over 15 years of fine dining experience to the kitchen at Joelle's Lounge. Trained in classical French technique and inspired by global flavors, he crafts seasonal menus that are bold, refined, and deeply rooted in the best local produce available.

team.name: Sofia Chen
team.blurb: Sofia ensures that every visit to Joelle's Lounge runs seamlessly from start to finish. With a sharp eye for detail and a genuine warmth for guests, she leads the front-of-house team with grace and sets the standard for hospitality across the restaurant.

team.name: Daniel Brooks
team.blurb: Daniel's encyclopedic knowledge of wine and spirits elevates every meal at Joelle's Lounge. He curates our cellar with a careful hand, selecting bottles that complement the menu and suit every palate — whether you're a seasoned connoisseur or simply curious to explore.

team.name: Test boy
team.blurb: He is the admin of the web, he love to eat.
